creator: muir@try.idiom.com
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
	Use bininst to grab something via ftp and SLIP.

	Watch what's going on by using ALT-F2.

	Wait for it to finish.

	Try to type something.  Nothing works.  ALT-F1 certainly
	doesn't.

	However, since I did this after I had a SLIP link up, I'm able
	to confirm that the system is not hung, just the console is
	hung.
